hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'wrangler deploy' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PRODUCTION DEPLOY DETECTED (wrangler deploy). Project deploy rule (see CLAUDE.md): before finishing, (1) commit the deployed changes to git on the live branch with a clear message so there is an audit log of exactly what shipped; (2) confirm any cleanup deletions are done (test rows/leads, temp or sentinel data). Hold back unrelated WIP that was not part of this deploy."},"systemMessage":"Prod deploy detected - commit the shipped changes to git and confirm test-data cleanup (project rule)."}' || true
